_meta.what: Census of per-root aorist-class assignments (col 10 of Приложение 1) in the author's manual Talmud-2.1.6.mdx — class size by ROOT COUNT (systematic productivity), not corpus token frequency. Built for H1054.
_meta.pada_caveat: pada is a per-root column, not per-aorist-class — the per-class pada split is indicative only
